title: MIND: Mould Intelligent Navigation Database
short_desc: A context-aware, enterprise-grade hybrid RAG chatbot designed to navigate complex engineering standards and technical manuals across global internal document repositories.
blueprint_desc: Designed as a dual-engine architecture to mitigate knowledge fragmentation in dense engineering documentation. Implements a hybrid information retrieval model fusing sparse lexical matching (Okapi BM25) for literal technical term precision with dense vector searches for abstract semantic similarity. The post-retrieval phase executes sequential query rewriting and adaptive cross-encoder reranking, outputting precise context-grounded text streams with front-end inline references directly mapped back to source context hashes. [SECURITY NOTICE: Core codebases, data verification pipelines, and empirical evaluations remain classified under strict corporate non-disclosure agreements.]
